description: collect a read-only Dynamo Kubernetes debug bundle (pods, events, jobs, PVCs, CR status; secrets scrubbed)
rules: read-only: only kubectl get/describe/logs are run; the cluster is never mutated
HF tokens, bearer tokens, and *_TOKEN/SECRET/PASSWORD/API_KEY values are redacted before anything is written to disk
remediation commands are returned to the operator, not executed
bundle + summary.json are written under record_store
usage: Set NAMESPACE (target namespace); optionally DEPLOYMENT_NAME to scope to one DynamoGraphDeployment. Output: summary.json (plus per-command .txt bundle files) under record_store.
limitation: Read-only — never mutates the cluster; remediation is returned, not run. Will not collect secrets or print HF tokens, so auth failures may still need user-side inspection. Bundle size grows with deployment size; on very large namespaces, scope with DEPLOYMENT_NAME. Does not validate disagg transport — use dynamo-interconnect-check for that.
